maiden-ice-rose.name: Maiden: Ice Rose

findings: 1.13 HOT: F1 kit team buff is 'except self' but model uses alliesOfElement Electric w/o self-exclusion -> she self-buffs +40.9/+20.9 every FB (arcana-fortune-mate bug family; fix=excludeSelf on alliesOfElement); F2 burst stackedNuke undercounts a stack when she bursts every rotation (offsets cold). Reconcile F1+F2 together

maiden-ice-rose.evidence: Solo neutral video — 547.62% rider popups exact, cadence measured (A12); solo 1.01
maiden-ice-rose.residual: Burst Max-HP scaling is a deliberate conservative lower-bound

skill1: Activates when entering Burst Stage 1 with MP at 0. MP recovers by 1. MP can be accumulated up to a maximum of 12. All accumulated MP is consumed when using Burst Skill.
Activates when entering Full Burst with MP above 1. MP replenishes by 1. MP can be accumulated up to a maximum of 12. All accumulated MP is consumed when using Burst Skill.

caveats: skill1: unparsed effect "MP replenishes by 1. MP can be accumulated up to a maximum of 12. All accumulated MP is consumed when using Burst Skill."
